label: Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption

node.label: Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption
node.definition: A model learns to reverse a gradual noising process or estimate its score field.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption is modeled as depending on Score matching & denoising score objectives, Differential equations and feeding downstream nodes such as Diffusion & score-based models.

limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Score matching & denoising score objectives, Differential equations.
